candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue figure on the income statement.
Represents unearned revenue (liability), not the period’s revenue.
Income statement production-related expense; matches COGS concept.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not an expense.
Aggregate operating expense including COGS; a total bucket. Since component rows exist, this should be avoided per instructions.
Overhead operating expenses, classic SG&A component excluding COGS and D&A.
Personnel-related operating costs, typically part of SG&A.
Appears to be a liability/accrual on balance sheet, not an income statement SG&A expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D; not the current-period R&D expense itself.
Explicit current-period research and development expense line on the income statement.
Capitalized development costs (asset), not expense.
Balancing line related to capitalized development; not the expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense from liabilities at amortised cost
candidates.why: Core interest expense on debt; best match for XINT.
Explicitly non-interest financial expenses; should be excluded.
Interest on lease liabilities; a subset of interest expense, but secondary to the main interest expense line.
Profit attributable to minority interests, not interest expense.
Duplicate of non-controlling interest; equity-related, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest, but core XINT should use the main interest expense line to avoid double counting.
Debt balance, not period interest expense.
Debt balance, not period interest expense.
Equity attributable to minority shareholders, not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interest; equity, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense from liabilities at amortised cost

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit, not a balance sheet equity stock.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Equity holder of the parent
candidates.why: Flow of comprehensive income, not the equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Represents book equity attributable to shareholders; best match for BE.
Includes both parent equity and non-controlling interest; slightly broader than BE target.
Balancing line, not the primary equity figure.
Balancing line, not the main substantive equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing construct for the whole balance sheet, not just equity.
Represents total assets / liabilities+equity, not equity alone.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to minority interest; a flow, not the balance.
Duplicate naming of non-controlling interest on income statement; again a flow.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income component, not the equity balance.
Represents the balance of minority shareholders’ equity; correct for MIB.
Alternative label for non-controlling interest; same concept.
